key_events: KOSPI index rebounds significantly (approx. 2.19% - 2.74% gain) following Middle East de-escalation signals
Investor confidence restored after geopolitical volatility; KOSDAQ also closed higher by 2.24%
Wall Street positive lead contributes to broad market recovery across tech and industrial sectors

key_highlights: Seoul art scene focuses on trust-building through initiatives like the '80% refund guarantee' digital art exhibit
Market pivot towards more discerning collectors and stability following 2025 contraction
Major 2026 outlook: Frieze Seoul continuity, museum programming (Seo-Seoul Museum of Art), and emphasis on technology-themed exhibitions
